function recordSettlement(address payer, address payee, bytes calldata inAmount, bytes calldata inReasonHash) external returns (bytes32)
function getSettlementHandles(bytes32 id) external view returns (bytes32 amount, bytes32 reasonHash, address payer, address payee, uint256 timestamp)
function getUserSettlementCount(address user) external view returns (uint256)
function getUserSettlementId(address user, uint256 index) external view returns (bytes32)
event SettlementRecorded(bytes32 indexed id, uint256 timestamp)
